D in CSE started in 2024 About us The Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), established in 1985 with an initial intake of 20 for the B.Tech (CSE) program, has grown into a center of excellence in education, research, and innovation. The department offers three undergraduate programs – B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), B.Tech in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science – AI & DS), and B.Tech in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning – AI & ML) – as well as Postgraduate program, including an M.Tech in Cyber Security and a Ph.D. program, supporting advanced research and specialization in emerging domains. Focusing on faculty-led research and R&D initiatives, the department promotes innovation, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills. Its strong industry collaborations, internships, and placement opportunities equip students for successful careers in emerging technology fields. Through the integration of quality education, research excellence, and industry engagement, the department continues to develop future-ready professionals capable of addressing global technological challenges. Total Publications 0 Startups 0 Signing MoU's 0 To emerge as a global centre of excellence in Computer Science & Engineering by imparting quality education, fostering innovation, and cutting-edge technologies, thereby addressing national priorities and contributing to technological and societal advancements. Vision To impart a strong foundation in computer science by cultivating analytical thinking, algorithmic problem-solving, programming proficiency, teamwork, and leadership skills among students To build a vibrant academic and research ecosystem that attracts talent and fosters collaboration in frontier areas. To strengthen industry and global research partnerships to drive innovations in computing, foster entrepreneurship, and deliver solutions to real-world challenges. To advance computing knowledge and innovation through impactful research and education, contributing to a digitally empowered, knowledge-driven society Mission Dr. D. Rajeswara Rao Professor & Head Welcome Message Welcome to the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. We are committed to academic excellence, fostering innovation, advancing research, and ensuring strong placement opportunities. Equipped with state-of-the-art laboratories, robust industry partnerships, and a dedicated faculty, we strive to prepare our students to become skilled professionals and innovative leaders ready to meet future challenges. Placement Highlights – Last 3 Years Over the last three years, our students have been successfully placed in leading multinational companies and reputed organizations across various sectors. The consistent placement record reflects the quality of our academic programs, the skills of our students, and the strong industry collaborations established by the institute. Total Offers 0 Companies Visited 0 HIghest Package 0 LPA Average CTC 0 LPA No.of Students -single offers 0 Above 10LPA 0 Know more Faculty The Department of Computer Science and Engineering boasts a highly qualified faculty, many of whom hold Ph.D.s and are recognized as research guides in areas such as Machine Learning, Data Analytics, Bioinformatics, and Information Security. The faculty actively engage in government and industry sponsored research projects, publish papers in reputed international journals, and hold patents. They present their innovations at international conferences and participate in faculty development programs (FDPs) and workshops. Strong industry collaborations further enhance practical learning and innovation. Committed to teaching and research, the faculty play a key role in preparing students to become skilled professionals and future innovators.
